creator: alexandre.martins@mc2-technologies.com
text:
Hi all !

There is an very old workaround in share/mk/sys.mk for ARM target:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=173375

That workaround make us compile ARM in "-O" optimisation level instead of "-O2".

It's maybe time to remove that ?

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/share/mk/sys.mk?view=annotate#l170

Thank you
